title: SARA SILVER BRIDGE — 'I'm SHINY now!'
prompt: Slow push-in extreme close-up in @dentist-chair on @Sara's face — Sara fills the frame, paper bib still clipped on, soft warm overhead exam light reflecting in her eyes. Sara gives one brave little thumbs-up to the camera. Then Sara opens her mouth WIDE, showing her teeth — and on one of her side molars there is a tiny shiny SILVER metal crown bridge cap, polished mirror-bright. A small sharp glint of light sparkles off the silver. Sara (mouth wide open, awe-struck whisper): "Whoaaa..." Sara (closing mouth slowly into a huge proud beaming smile): "I'm SHINY now!" Solo shot — only Sara's face and shoulders, no other people in frame, no other faces visible.
